'''Wooyou Senn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and commanded [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']].

==Biography==
Wooyou Senn was tasked with the destruction of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] force in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] including their shipyard in the [[Nocto system/Legends|Nocto system]], and his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] was the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class]] ship the [[Vengeance (Executor-class)|''Vengeance'']]. During the ensuing [[Battle of Nocto]], Admiral Senn and his task force engaged the Rebel forces in their stronghold. However, after the ''Vengeance''{{'s}} shields were disabled, he was taken by surprise and perished when the Rebels and their [[Airam (group)|Airam]] allies were able to ram three Dreadnaughts, containing explosives, into the rear of the ''Vengeance'' while a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] rammed directly towards the bridge.<ref name="BOP" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Wooyou Senn was created for the [[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns|''Balance of Power'']] expansion pack for the [[1997]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''. The character's full name was revealed in the instruction manual accompanying the game.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
